nasb.text: and the men are shepherds, for they have been keepers of livestock; and they have brought their flocks and their herds and all that they have.’

esv.text: And the men are shepherds, for they have been keepers of livestock, and they have brought their flocks and their herds and all that they have.’

cnv.text: 這些人都是牧羊人，以牧養牲畜為生。他們把自己的牛羊和一切所有的，都帶來了。’

ccb.text: 你们是牧人，以畜牧为业，已经把羊群、牛群和所有的一切都带来了。

csbs.text: 这些人是牧羊的，是牧养牲畜的人；他们把羊群、牛群和一切属于他们的都带来了。’
